en.name: Sanji
en.effectText: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Up to 1 of your Characters without an [On Play] effect and with a cost of 8 or less gains [Rush] during this turn. (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)

jp.name: サンジ
jp.effectText: 【起動メイン】【ターン1回】自分のコスト8以下の【登場時】効果を持たないキャラ1枚までは、このターン中、【速攻】を得る。(このカードは登場したターンにアタックできる)

definition.name: Sanji
definition.text: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] Up to 1 of your Characters without an [On Play] effect and with a cost of 8 or less gains [Rush] during this turn. (This card can attack on the turn in which it is played.)
